name: Quiz Master
description: Awarded to players who achieve a perfect score in 10 consecutive quizzes

name: Rising Star
description: Earned by new players who reach 1000 points in their first week

name: Knowledge Titan
description: Awarded to players who excel in all knowledge categories

name: Streak Master
description: Maintained a 30-day login streak without missing a day

name: Time Extender
description: Adds 15 extra seconds to any timed quiz

name: Question Skipper
description: Skip a difficult question without penalty

name: Audience Help
description: Shows how other players answered this question

name: Second Chance
description: Allows you to retry a question after getting it wrong

name: Quiz Champion
description: Awarded to the top player on the seasonal leaderboard

name: Hint Revealer
description: Reveals a helpful hint for the current question
